meaning: n.比根,比根舞,一种节奏由慢而快的南美舞
examples: This is the reason why the Beguine study is always lagging relatively.
Beguine: a member of any of several lay sisterhoods founded in the Netherlands in the 13th century.
Beguine: a member of any of several lay sisterhoods founded in the Netherlands in the 13 th century.
Martinique is the birthplace of the African-French music form "the Beguine", whose influence can be heard in the zouk music of the French West Indies.
